axes.name: Clarity
axes.description: The writing is easy to understand on a first read and avoids confusion.

axes.name: Simplicity
axes.description: The language is plain, direct, and free of inflated or needless wording.

axes.name: Brevity and economy
axes.description: The piece uses only the space it needs and avoids throat-clearing or repetition.

axes.name: Structure and flow
axes.description: The organization is logical and carries the reader smoothly from one point to the next.

axes.name: Specificity and precision
axes.description: The piece uses concrete, exact, informative wording rather than vague generalities.

axes.name: Humanity and voice
axes.description: The writing sounds human, engaged, and reader-aware rather than bureaucratic or mechanical.

axes.name: Overall effectiveness
axes.description: Overall nonfiction writing quality for the task.

judging_instructions: Score the response against each axis on a 1-5 scale. Judge the writing that is on the page, not the model's reputation. Keep the rationale short and concrete.
